<?php namespace Vonage\Messages\MessageObjects; use Vonage\Entity\Hydrator\ArrayHydrateInterface; class VCardObject implements ArrayHydrateInterface { public function __construct( private string $url, private ?string $caption = null ) { } public function fromArray(array $data): VCardObject { $this->url = $data['url']; return $this; } public function toArray(): array { return [ 'url' => $this->url ]; } public function getUrl(): string { return $this->url; } public function getCaption(): ?string { return $this->caption; } public function setCaption(?string $caption): void { $this->caption = $caption; } }
